tagline: MERN Full-stack Developer • AI & Data Analytics • Cybersecurity Enthusiast
description: Aspiring full-stack developer with hands-on MERN projects, SQL/Python data analysis experience, and practical exposure to AI/ML and cybersecurity simulations.

roles.detailed: MERN Full-stack | AI / ML | Data Analytics | Cybersecurity

bio: I build user-focused web applications and data-driven solutions. Trained in MERN full-stack development, experienced with React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, and comfortable using Python and SQL for data tasks. I also have completed virtual simulations and workshops in cybersecurity and GenAI-powered analytics.

bullets: Completed hands-on cybersecurity tasks including threat analysis and security best practices.
Designed a phishing simulation and proposed mitigation recommendations.
experience.desc: Practical cybersecurity exercises focused on threat modelling and incident mitigation.

bullets: Performed exploratory data analysis and built AI models for customer delinquency prediction.
Produced business reports and data storytelling outputs to inform collections strategy.
experience.desc: GenAI-powered analytics simulation covering EDA, model-building, and business reporting.

bullets: Designed phishing email simulations to evaluate organizational vulnerability and response.
Interpreted simulation results and documented mitigation strategies.
experience.desc: Hands-on simulation exercises for phishing detection and mitigation planning.
